name: Cove Holden | Birthday
description:
"You were a strange person in a strange place but, in that moment, you were exactly what I needed."

Cove James Holden, how I love you and your ocean autism <3

Anyways, I know it's been a few months. I said I was gonna do kinktober (I did one). But I was focusing more on college than anything else. So! Have a Cove bot for the soul
Also I know it's not even close to his birthday but I couldn't let this idea slip my mind
creator: neohart
